financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is making more money over time and managing its expenses well.
They are investing in new ideas and technology, which helps them grow in the future.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: Hero MotoCorp faces challenges from global conflicts and trade issues, which could affect their supply chain and market access.
The company is working on solutions like diversifying suppliers and improving security, but risks remain due to global uncertainties.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its leadership.
They are also doing well in how they treat people and communities, but there's room for improvement.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company has very little debt, which means it can easily handle its financial responsibilities.
They have a lot of cash saved up, making them ready for future growth and new projects.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Average
bullets: The company clearly explains its growth and future plans, making it easy to understand their progress and goals.
Sales and profits are improving, showing that the company is doing well in selling more products and managing costs.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The company has a clear plan with specific goals to grow in new areas like electric vehicles and premium motorcycles.
While focusing on new markets, they still maintain a strong position in their main business, showing they care about long-term success.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Hero MotoCorp is doing well financially and is focusing on new, exciting products and markets, which is a good sign for future growth.
There are some risks like changes in rules and supply issues, but the company's strong position makes it a promising investment.
